title: ERR_PNPM_OUTDATED_LOCKFILE
search_intent: Fix pnpm install failures when CI refuses to install with an outdated lockfile.
why_developers_search_it: Developers often hit this after package.json changes without regenerating pnpm-lock.yaml.
evidence_summary: The pnpm install documentation describes frozen lockfile behavior in CI and why installs fail when the lockfile is not current.
suggested_related_errors: GitHub Actions npm ci lockfile error
notes: Example only. Validate current SERP and official docs before expansion.

error_signature: Prisma P1001: Can't reach database server
title: Prisma P1001 can't reach database server
search_intent: Troubleshoot Prisma connection failures when the app cannot reach the configured database host.
why_developers_search_it: The error appears during local development, migrations, and deploy checks when DATABASE_URL or network access is wrong.
evidence_summary: Prisma documents P1001 as a database reachability error tied to server host and port connectivity.
notes: Example only. Confirm Dev Error DB category fit before generating a page.

error_signature: Error: listen EADDRINUSE: address already in use
title: Node.js EADDRINUSE address already in use
search_intent: Resolve Node.js server startup failures when a local port is already in use.
why_developers_search_it: Developers need to identify the process occupying a port before restarting a dev server or API.
evidence_summary: Node.js documents EADDRINUSE as a system error for an address already in use.

Docker compose port is already allocated
